sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30503" key="e)/gkwpon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔγκωπον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n30503.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">part</tr_> of the ship <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">between the foremost and hindmost oars</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1240.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Callix.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
